name: Inklings
tagline: A storybook your child stars in.
value_props: Persistent character family — kids build a story universe, not a one-off book
Voice-first kid Studio with parent approval gate before anything publishes
Real printed children's books via Amazon KDP POD

brand.voice: warm, gentle, magical, parent-trustworthy, never sales-y

stack: Next 15 + Tailwind 3 + Prisma 6 + Postgres 17 + Stripe 15 + pdf-lib + sharp
spine_deviations: rounded-button 12px (vs spine 6px) — softer for consumer audience
marketing palette is cream/plum (vs spine teal/blue) — storybook tone
